notes: Reviewed EN batch for the first 100 current src/data/notes.ts todo entries.

entries.gt_00bedb97b66db7: External-cell supply: water and bread go through the kitchen, replace the courier after the siren. Do not look for the old courier at the post; he has already been written down as a debtor.
entries.gt_012116f9827cfe: The back of the slip is smeared with a black palm. On the front there is only the entrance number.
entries.gt_04c47a75de0c14: Complaint from section 4: the boiling water smells of machine oil. Please send a plumber, not a liftman.
entries.gt_04f4bca06879ad: The neighbor's complaint smelled of smoke, though the smoking room had been walled up. Attach the ash to the case.
entries.gt_060b48718a1cd5: Unsigned note: leave the bread under the radiator in the evening, do not ask about Chernobog in the kitchen. Whoever asked aloud later gives water through a neighbor.
entries.gt_06ab2d2ee1a3f1: The lift let the paper through and returned the person later. Keep the paper as a witness.
entries.gt_06e2ba213e68f7: The technotoilet workers closed the restroom with a wire and a note to the cistern. Open only in boots and with a witness.
entries.gt_08da4c2efdab63: A clean certificate is needed not by the doctor, but by the queue at the quarantine desk. A cough is enough for the doctor; the guards need a dry stamp without stains.
entries.gt_094663b8b15dbb: Shift act: sample in jar 17 moved in front of the chief and lay still in front of junior staff.
entries.gt_09bb4f33490e6b: Attach the pump passport to the pipe request. Without a passport, the repair goes to the end of the queue.
entries.gt_0b163833064bc4: The pressure gauge trembles when the collector is too quiet. If it trembles, do not touch the valve without a fitter.
entries.gt_0becf33471c9f9: Keep the pressure log with a quarantine pen. If the needle jerks, do not close the shift.
entries.gt_0c215b0f854120: Red foam and a bed list were found in the kitchen. The cook said: this is not a recipe, this is a denunciation in liquid form.
entries.gt_0ca92cbe04a423: Cult ledger: do not feed the idol after midnight. It returns rations with names.
entries.gt_0e03e4395c952d: The neighbor joined the rust circle. In the morning he had faith, and we had no hammer.
entries.gt_0e40aa4791326e: Prayer scrap: the black palm is not the sign. The sign is when the hand is no longer yours.
entries.gt_0f03cfd6d1d5c9: Do not take a blank form without a number. The Ministry demands witnesses and cuts off extra signatures.
entries.gt_110966628fed66: A quarantine stamp dries only on cold paper. Set a warm sheet aside until the doctor's round.
entries.gt_1485db0908c9a7: NII issue list: empty container, matte label, wire seal, two pills against certainty.
entries.gt_1726c230f12c28: Field order: if the lift smells of iodine, the sample is carried by someone other than the one who took it.
entries.gt_1804d0889bd3b6: Field sheet: before entering a quiet room, throw a nut. If there is no sound, retreat to the panel.
entries.gt_18f43a4418dedf: In a Void warrant, the signature is placed after reconciling the missing. Do not touch the field before reconciliation.
entries.gt_19e4e2570464ca: Charcoal mark by the kitchen: do not make noise, do not look into the sack, put food on the floor.
entries.gt_1befeaa2a3133e: The archive VOID stamp can be read only in side light. Do not set a direct lamp: the case number fades.
entries.gt_1c7cbb55086589: The relay diagram shows a short route through darkness. Do not send trainees through it.
entries.gt_1cd4d09f926727: Raid receipt: cabinet checked, shortage recorded. The section elder accepted the counter-complaint.
entries.gt_1d959bf86f7e2e: OBZH evacuation log: count heads aloud, keep hands busy, do not argue at the door.
entries.gt_1ed2445225695f: Store the void needle in a tin box. Do not keep it near a child's map or a magnet.
entries.gt_20990ebc44c259: If the lift smells of the previous shift, do not press the button twice. The second request counts as boarding.
entries.gt_23ef7fbdb64b5f: The form was blank before the applicant was received. After the first signature, consider the application filed.
entries.gt_241092e5971157: Emergency box opened. Inside there is only the issue procedure. Draft a request for a real kit.
entries.gt_244b3e00ae1298: Debt paper: neighbor did not return the filter. Filter found by the door, neighbor not marked on the sheltered list.
entries.gt_26cd0ebd86b3fa: Service note: hide the samosbor report in the general archive. The general archive is general enough.
entries.gt_2786730292181c: NII, experiment log: open the chemical-protection cabinet with two witnesses; the third is responsible for the seal.
entries.gt_278e6d52dff367: Complaint under sealing wax is warm after the radiator. Open with gloves; do not drip wax onto the case.
entries.gt_27ed6738d721a1: A fake ledger protects you only at the post. At the hermodoor they ask for a face, coupon, and room number.
entries.gt_2927a93dab15a2: Collision protocol: black palms, one witness, seize without publicity.
entries.gt_2a0a2713429680: Betonov field order: before the Collectors, take water, a filter, and an empty container; on lower routes say "sample", not "trophy".
entries.gt_2b6804d9dd9b19: Liquidator inventory: dry ration is heavier near a monster. Count the weight as a warning.
entries.gt_2bb2ddacf41e5f: The lift bypass form requires the signature of a floor that does not exist. Look for the signature between the buttons.
entries.gt_2bd8d805252789: The form refusing the form is filed in two copies: return one blank, do not sign the second.
entries.gt_2c6d4b5a4f64c8: Cut glass with gloves. Enter outside noise and complaints in the sanitary log.
entries.gt_2cd4dbc342612b: O.D.: patient arrived without a spoon, without a coupon, and with pride. Remove the pride, find the rest.
entries.gt_2e9acce136b1b6: Yakov clearance log: do not blow off PSI dust. Brush it into a jar; keep your face in a mask.
entries.gt_2e9f355c50763e: Medroom act: a morphine ampoule is signed with the name of a doctor not on the lists. Store until the list is checked.
entries.gt_2ec155878efeed: Department summary: process Liquidator reinforcement as humanitarian escort. Do not include ammunition in the weight.
entries.gt_2ef2f115cdc610: The card file creaks on surnames without addresses. After opening, reconcile cabinet and log.
entries.gt_2f0a18bca0a5f8: The meat rune warms from a bare hand. Do not discuss apartment numbers near it.
entries.gt_2f4ad6f607b7c4: When filing the list with the Ministry, do not argue whether it is holy or not. Write: irregular all-clear glow.
entries.gt_3157fd9fc88366: Moneychanger notice: a gas-mask filter is worth more dry and with an issue tag. Wet after someone else's mask will not get cheaper.
entries.gt_322e8cba38d692: Lab assistant memo: do not put the white sample by a mirror. The reflection interferes with color reconciliation.
entries.gt_3271ce63aa7916: Courier rule: the caravan left by a route drawn on the ceiling that morning. Pay the advance only to a living guide.
entries.gt_3294e8b66ab1d4: Archive extract: external cells, black palms, witnesses do not match.
entries.gt_3385f32959ca1f: A forged stub passes old doors. Inspectors read better than doors.
entries.gt_3629e2d7ad1031: A small cult stays small until it steals a tool, spoils the soup, or closes the common restroom.
entries.gt_365c77676a86e8: A microchip after moisture gives a false corridor diagram. Look through glass; do not touch with hands.
entries.gt_3788b47a251543: Ration calculation: the gray briquette feeds the body, the green one feeds rumors. Do not give green to children after dark.
entries.gt_38f6d111e105d7: Deputy minister resolution: seize the sheltered list before gratitude appears. Store empty lines separately.
entries.gt_39853c2fa274a6: Letter without address: saw my apartment at the other end of the section. A person with my water-queue place lived there.
entries.gt_39ba518f0b18bf: The sheltered ledger did not match the gratitude lists. The section elder demands the empty lines be returned to the archive.
entries.gt_3b47d224d4b79b: If the station repeated, sit still. The second time it usually checks the brave.
entries.gt_3cc7e353c63294: Resolution on report: replace the word "hunger" with "reduction of food initiative". Collect signatures before dinner.
entries.gt_3dcb5b35d27919: Lesson log: Vitya brought chalk, Mira counted breaths, Vadim rewrote the list without surnames behind the door.
entries.gt_3e4122f1d437dc: Shelter instruction: the crying one counts too. Quietly, one by one, until all-clear or a new command.
entries.gt_3f3cb323f2ee7f: Shelter log: the sheltered list did not match the survivors list. Correct after the next round.
entries.gt_3f415b769e6859: Commission order: temporarily limit water in sections with a high level of gratitude.
entries.gt_4317d89803f686: Concrete-closure act: sealed the crack, sealed the storekeeper with it. The storekeeper objected from the other side until all-clear.
entries.gt_43528dd936b2f5: Golden circuit act: four were inside, two knocked outside, divide water after all-clear without words about miracles.
entries.gt_442e36dd5a459c: Sign by the hermodoor: all-clear by the board, not by knocking. Whoever asks to open can wait for the second check.
entries.gt_44a39e17eec451: Cabinet protocol: brewing the floor has been recognized as a localization measure. Determine the term of temporariness later.
entries.gt_45a51f1c0f5cb3: Black ledger: sell the map to the Ministry and get a seal; sell it to the market and get a knife and change.
entries.gt_45efb5ec60780d: Rusty charter: do not keep the wrench with the fitter. Upon disappearance, draw up an act.
entries.gt_47cf0ae4d7f273: Note by the bathroom: water is issued by coupon and bucket. Disputes about coupon seniority are held after the queue.
entries.gt_4bce8d89384816: Receipt by the storeroom: Nila took two cans of stew before the siren. If she does not return, count the debt as smoke.
entries.gt_4d21333e8294c7: The safe accepts official stubs and fake certificates equally. The difference appears during a search.
entries.gt_4d6091d19269f9: After samosbor, the sanitary crew counts people at the hermodoor first, then tools. Sometimes the lists match.
entries.gt_508b4fedb87ca8: An official pass warms if a forged one is nearby. Keep separate, or the ink runs.
entries.gt_50d20bd2660844: Ministry note: citizens will be notified after completion of the notification period.
entries.gt_510830a859a2b6: Aid-post entry: issue the newcomer water, bread, a bandage, and a route to the nearest hermodoor. Check that he understood with his feet.
entries.gt_52a8e86eab59a2: A pass without a stub counts as a request for interrogation. The request is granted quickly.
entries.gt_5528f36c2ca861: The permanent pass was extended until the next wall rearrangement. After rearrangement, it is temporary.
entries.gt_557ed398427091: Store the siren shard in a tin box. Do not put it to your ear: the stairwell rings for three days afterward.
entries.gt_56ff6c86e0765d: Market tag: do not take a silver sample from those who say "almost clean". Almost pays poorly.
entries.gt_577e1e9e08133b: The basement pressure gauge shows excess pressure. Take the welders' surnames before work begins.
entries.gt_59fd8a6f31768b: Accounting ink does not dry after damp. Collect signatures in pencil until drying.
entries.gt_5a0070cc88710a: The lamp blinked in Morse: do not stand under me. The electrician confirmed without approaching.
entries.gt_5bff5d51f3fbb0: Section ban: do not draw a palm on the hermodoor. Such marks are later washed off together with the paint.
entries.gt_5c75e60d421843: The temporary pass expired in the middle of the corridor. The post demands payment for the second half of the route.
entries.gt_5cbabcae8601b2: If the case returned to the shelf without a mark, do not accept it. Check the courier and the seal.
entries.gt_5de09ae19af588: Apply sealant along the dry edge. A wet edge means pressure is already pushing from the other side.
entries.gt_5e157522532e37: Resident memo: if a neighbor asks for salt and meaning, give salt through the door.
entries.gt_5e7fcd6b2c2e34: Hammer found in refrigerator. That means someone repaired the cold; check the freezer circuit.
entries.gt_61c301f731a7ab: In the margins of the OBZH log: do not listen to a door with your ear. Check a door by its hinge, crack, and whoever stands farthest away.
entries.gt_64dcc72005f047: Siren instruction: run into the room, close the hermodoor, check the gasket, and step away from the handle.
entries.gt_656d5e24b1afcd: PSI office memo: treat a clot as a tool; measure recoil by pulse, hand tremor, and mistakes in the log.
entries.gt_6711ef7c2cf592: Kitchen certificate: canned food has grown into the wall with labels outward. Do not open the wall without the house committee.
entries.gt_6730b257b5af8b: Rust-worshippers removed the restroom hinges and wrote: metal is free. The queue answered with its feet.
entries.gt_67c9d936ea3d20: Aid post: issue bandages after inspecting hands. Whoever came without water goes first to boiling water, then into the log.
entries.gt_67ee3395f576aa: Act L-12: white residue removed from the floor with fire. Enter resident complaints in the appendix after ventilation.
entries.gt_688ef2b8c6a526: Broken sample list: black slime - burn; white - do not look; silver - only to Yakov or NII, not the market.
